component.name: KbCell
component.script:
sub init() m.frame = m.top.findNode("frame") m.bg = m.top.findNode("bg") m.label = m.top.findNode("label") applyState(0.0) end sub
sub onContent() c = m.top.itemContent if c = invalid then return m.label.text = c.title ' MarkupGrid recycles cells - reset to the unfocused look on ' bind so a recycled cell doesn't keep its previous focus ' colour after being moved to a new content slot. applyState(m.top.focusPercent) end sub
sub onFocus() applyState(m.top.focusPercent) end sub
sub applyState(f as Float) if f >= 0.5 then m.frame.color = "0xff5555ff" m.bg.color = "0xff2424ff" m.label.color = "0xffffffff" else m.frame.color = "0x202028ff" m.bg.color = "0x484858ff" m.label.color = "0xeeeeeeff" end if end sub
